headlines.headline: Frelol Software announces major organizational restructuring

sentiment.reasoning: Organizational restructuring often signals cost-cutting or strategic pivots that create immediate operational friction but may improve long-term efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
